matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-report_33-012 title: verify suggestions screen display with empty data module: suggestions source pages: 4 preconditions: application is running. test data: no specific input required. test steps: 1. launch the application. 2. navigate to the map screen. 3. tap on the "button for suggestions". 4. observe the suggestions screen. expected result: the suggestions screen should display a message indicating no data available.

test case id: tc-report_33-024 title: verify user can access suggestions screen after selecting current position and city module: suggestions source pages: 4 preconditions: application is running. test data: user's current gps coordinates and valid city name. test steps: 1. launch the application. 2. navigate to the map screen. 3. tap on the "select current position" option. 4. confirm the current position. 5. select a city from the dropdown. 6. tap on the "button for suggestions". 7. observe the suggestions screen. expected result: the application should display the suggestions screen with relevant suggestions based on the current position and selected city.

test case id: tc-report_33-001 title: verify user can select state, region, and city module: location selection source pages: 2 preconditions: application is running. test data: valid state, region, and city names. test steps: 1. launch the application. 2. navigate to the initial screen. 3. select a state from the dropdown. 4. select a region from the dropdown. 5. select a city from the dropdown. 6. tap on the "select current position" option. 7. tap on the "select state, region, and city" option. 8. enter the selected state, region, and city. 9. submit the selection. expected result: the application should display the selected location and proceed to fetch data from the server.
